#  Email Specifications (iOS) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:** 'Standard' level permissions or higher on the project's Specifications tool.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Specifications** tool on your iOS mobile device.
  2. Tap the division that contains the specification section you want to email.
  3. Tap the specification section you want to email.
  4. Tap **Share** ![Icon Share Ios](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/7a73901ace9b5af312be471b332469bc/5bf0e9aaaf3dba1dbf0b74114dc048d1/icon-share-ios.png?fm=webp&h=18).  
![Specifications Ios Email Specifications](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/f344058acab07784565bfda32ca3c297/cc7023b65de6ff8e22c6e6d0c6d1f6f8/specifications-ios-email-specifications.png?fm=webp)
  5. Tap your preferred email application.
  6. Tap into the following fields to enter the appropriate information:
     * **To** **:** Tap the 'To' field to select the user(s) or groups who will receive the email.
     * **Cc** **:** (Optional) Tap the 'Cc' field to include other users you want to copy on the email. You (the person sending out the email) will automatically be copied on the email.
     * **Bcc** **:** (Optional) Tap the 'Bcc' field to blind carbon copy other users on the email.
     * **Subject** **:** The default subject will be auto-populated with the item's name and number. Tap the 'Subject' field to edit the subject.
     * **Optional Comments** **:** Tap the field to enter any additional comments that will appear in the body of email.
  7. Tap **Send**.


## See Also
  * [View Specifications (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-ios/tutorials/view-specifications-ios)
  * [Specifications (iOS) - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-ios/permissions)
  * [View Specification Area (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-ios/tutorials/view-specification-area-ios)
title: Email Specifications (iOS)
description: How to email specifications from your iOS mobile device.
